item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Succulent pork neck with penne pasta tossed in creamyherb sauce with fresh herbs, topped with crispy salad in vinaigrette

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Thai Red Curry with chicken and vegetables, withJasmine rice/brown rice and topped with toasted sesame/coconut mix and parsley.Hereto lime and cilantro on the side Green dish: Thai Red Curry with tofu and vegetables, with Jasminerice/brown rice and topped with toasted sesame/coconut mix and parsley. Heretolime and cilantro on the side

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Phad krapow, a bold and aromatic stir fry with pork, Thai basil and sesame,topped with a soft centred fried egg. Served with steamed rice GREEN DISH: Phad tofu as a fragrant stir fry with spiced tofu, Thai basil and sesame,topped with fried egg and served with rice Lunch 11 a.m. — 1:30 p.m. Lunch 11 a.m. — 2 p.m. 7:30 a.m. to 5 p.m. Slagtehusgade 11, 2. sal DK-1715 København V CVR: 40909109 Kay Fiskers Pl. 102 300 København +45 31 10 05 58

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Lentil and seasonal vegetable dahl gently simmered with warm spices, servedwith garam masala spiced chicken. Finished with cooling mint yoghurt and freshherbs GREEN DISH: Lentil and seasonal vegetable dahl infused with warm spices, served with garammasala spiced paneer. Finished with mint yoghurt and fresh herbs Lunch 11 a.m. — 1:30 p.m. Lunch 11 a.m. — 2 p.m. 7:30 a.m. to 5 p.m. Slagtehusgade 11, 2. sal DK-1715 København V CVR: 40909109 Kay Fiskers Pl. 102 300 København +45 31 10 05 58

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Danish Biksemad with organic home-pickled beets,freshly chopped parsley and cold bearnaise cream served with toasted rye bread Green dish: Danish vegetarian Biksemad with organic home-pickledbeets, freshly chopped parsley and cold bearnaise cream served with toasted ryebread Lunch 11 a.m. — 1:30 p.m. Lunch 11 a.m. — 2 p.m. 7:30 a.m. to 5 p.m. Slagtehusgade 11, 2. sal DK-1715 København V CVR: 40909109 Kay Fiskers Pl. 102 300 København +45 31 10 05 58
